creator: yanegomi@gmail.com
text:
Hi!
 	Here's an equivalent patch I generated in parallel. I removed the 
hunk from configure.in instead of regenerating the patch against the 
original, so it appears smaller/less invasive.
 	Also...

$ ldd `which nmbd` `which smbd` | egrep '^/|libmd'
/usr/local/sbin/nmbd:
         libmd.so.5 => /lib/libmd.so.5 (0x801765000)
/usr/local/sbin/smbd:
         libmd.so.5 => /lib/libmd.so.5 (0x80211f000)

Thanks!
-Garrett
